description: Pure-Rust Android decompiler and security-audit suite. DEX → Java, Hermes → JavaScript. Cross-layer taint across the React Native bridge. CycloneDX SBOM + OpenVEX. CLI and MCP. Bytecode is not a security layer.
commit_message:
feat: cross-layer Android RE binary — audit, decompile, taint, MCP server

Unified command surface over APK, XAPK, DEX, and Hermes bundles.
CrossLayerContext is built once per invocation from a single path;
MCP sessions don't accumulate leaked buffers across loads.

- audit: Semgrep + TruffleHog + YARA-X + STIX 2.1 in one pass;
  findings + taint_flows in SQLite
- taint: HBC → bridge → DEX; 15 sources × 15 sinks; JS NativeModule
  → @ReactMethod → sink. taint_flow_count = canonical count of
  HB
